news.title:
CONCOR suspends trade with Gulf ports, expects short-term volatility.
Company reassures adaptability to demand changes, no need for panic.
news.summary:
CONCOR suspends trade with Gulf ports, expects short-term volatility.
Company reassures adaptability to demand changes, no need for panic.

news.title:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.
news.summary:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.

news.title: CONCOR collaborates with Vizhinjam Port to establish a cargo facility in Kerala.
news.summary: CONCOR collaborates with Vizhinjam Port to establish a cargo facility in Kerala.

news.title:
CONCOR and VISL signed a non-binding MoU to develop a Container Freight Station near Vizhinjam Seaport.
VISL will provide land on agreed terms; facilities include Customs bonded area, warehouses, yard, and cargo handling.
news.summary:
CONCOR and VISL signed a non-binding MoU to develop a Container Freight Station near Vizhinjam Seaport.
VISL will provide land on agreed terms; facilities include Customs bonded area, warehouses, yard, and cargo handling.

news.title:
Govt plans to raise ₹80,000 Cr via stake sale in 7 railway PSUs, retaining 51% ownership to fund modernization.
Key stocks include IRFC, CONCOR, IRCTC, RVNL, Ircon, RailTel, and RITES; focus on infrastructure upgrades and monetization goals.
news.summary:
Govt plans to raise ₹80,000 Cr via stake sale in 7 railway PSUs, retaining 51% ownership to fund modernization.
Key stocks include IRFC, CONCOR, IRCTC, RVNL, Ircon, RailTel, and RITES; focus on infrastructure upgrades and monetization goals.

news.title:
CONCOR announces investor meet on 24.02.2026 with Kotak Securities.
Meeting to discuss results, presentations, and publicly available info in Mumbai.
news.summary:
CONCOR announces investor meet on 24.02.2026 with Kotak Securities.
Meeting to discuss results, presentations, and publicly available info in Mumbai.

news.title:
Container Corporation of India Ltd. announces investor meetings in Mumbai on 11th and 18th Feb 2026.
Key officials will discuss post-results data, presentations, and public domain information.
news.summary:
Container Corporation of India Ltd. announces investor meetings in Mumbai on 11th and 18th Feb 2026.
Key officials will discuss post-results data, presentations, and public domain information.

news.title:
Container Corporation approved Rs. 3.40/share dividend, total Rs. 7.60/share for FY26.
Achieved record 4.15M TEUs in Dec 2025, raised FY26 CAPEX to Rs. 1060 Cr.
news.summary:
Container Corporation approved Rs. 3.40/share dividend, total Rs. 7.60/share for FY26.
Achieved record 4.15M TEUs in Dec 2025, raised FY26 CAPEX to Rs. 1060 Cr.

news.title:
Container Corp signs agreement to form joint venture BCSL for container ship operations.
BCSL aims to enhance Container Corp's container shipping capabilities.
news.summary:
Container Corp signs agreement to form joint venture BCSL for container ship operations.
BCSL aims to enhance Container Corp's container shipping capabilities.

news.title:
CONCOR signed MoU on 3 Feb 2026 for JV Bharat Container Shipping Line.
JV includes SCI, 3 port authorities, Sagarmala Finance; CONCOR, SCI hold 30% each.
news.summary:
CONCOR signed MoU on 3 Feb 2026 for JV Bharat Container Shipping Line.
JV includes SCI, 3 port authorities, Sagarmala Finance; CONCOR, SCI hold 30% each.

news.title:
Govt signs MoU to establish Bharat Container Shipping Line (BCSL).
Ministers Sarbananda Sonowal and Ashwini Vaishnaw witnessed the MoU signing.
news.summary:
Govt signs MoU to establish Bharat Container Shipping Line (BCSL).
Ministers Sarbananda Sonowal and Ashwini Vaishnaw witnessed the MoU signing.

news.title:
CONCOR is finalizing a major deal for three key ports today.
This move may boost its operations and expand its logistics network.
news.summary:
CONCOR is finalizing a major deal for three key ports today.
This move may boost its operations and expand its logistics network.

news.title:
Budget 2026-27 allocates ₹10,000 crore for container manufacturing under Atmanirbharta.
Plans include 20 new waterways and a coastal shipping promotion scheme.
news.summary:
Budget 2026-27 allocates ₹10,000 crore for container manufacturing under Atmanirbharta.
Plans include 20 new waterways and a coastal shipping promotion scheme.

news.title: Concor shares rose over 2% after FM announced high-speed rail corridors.
news.summary: Concor shares rose over 2% after FM announced high-speed rail corridors.

news.title: Goldman Sachs retains a Sell rating on CONCOR, revising the target price to ₹490 from ₹500.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs retains a Sell rating on CONCOR, revising the target price to ₹490 from ₹500.

news.title:
Container Corporation of India targets Rs.15,000 crore revenue by FY29.
CONCOR aims for 10 million TEUs throughput by FY29.
news.summary:
Container Corporation of India targets Rs.15,000 crore revenue by FY29.
CONCOR aims for 10 million TEUs throughput by FY29.

news.title:
Container Corp of India expects over 15% EXIM growth in FY27, driven by the Western Dedicated Freight Corridor and robust domestic logistics demand.
FY29 revenue is projected at ₹15,000 crore, with a 23% capex increase for FY26 to ₹1,060 crore to meet growing demand and procure rolling stock.
news.summary:
Container Corp of India expects over 15% EXIM growth in FY27, driven by the Western Dedicated Freight Corridor and robust domestic logistics demand.
FY29 revenue is projected at ₹15,000 crore, with a 23% capex increase for FY26 to ₹1,060 crore to meet growing demand and procure rolling stock.

news.title:
CONCOR management reiterates guidance for throughput, Exim, and domestic business.
This indicates stability in their operational outlook and plans.
news.summary:
CONCOR management reiterates guidance for throughput, Exim, and domestic business.
This indicates stability in their operational outlook and plans.

news.title: Container Corporation expects strong domestic loading in Q4FY26 driven by bulk cement business.
news.summary: Container Corporation expects strong domestic loading in Q4FY26 driven by bulk cement business.

news.title:
CONCOR's EXIM revenue is projected to surpass ₹6,000 crore, says Sanjay Swarup.
The company aims to achieve a 13% volume growth target for the year.
news.summary:
CONCOR's EXIM revenue is projected to surpass ₹6,000 crore, says Sanjay Swarup.
The company aims to achieve a 13% volume growth target for the year.
